name: repo-platform
description: Tooling manifest for repo-platform (biome, husky, the bun scripts' yaml parser); the actions carry their own dependencies.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run lint:actions && bun run lint:sh && bun run typecheck && bun run typography && bun run lint:yaml && bun run validate && bun run gitignore:check && bun run compose:check
scripts.lint:actions: if command -v actionlint >/dev/null; then actionlint; else echo 'actionlint not installed locally; CI runs it (brew install actionlint)'; fi
scripts.lint:sh: if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null; then find .github/scripts -name "*.sh" -print0 | xargs -0 shellcheck; else echo 'shellcheck not installed locally; CI runs it (brew install shellcheck)'; fi
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc -p . && (cd actions/check-typography && bun x tsc -p .) && (cd actions/validate-commit-names && bun x tsc -p .) && (cd actions/validate-template && bun x tsc -p .)
